languages.text: "Я вас понял, Ваша Светлость. Так, нужно будет выписать им скоростные шаттлы, картографы... Простите, я займусь списком необходимого снаряжения и организацией его поставок позже".
"I understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, we'll need to issue high-speed shuttles, cartographers... Forgive me, I will draw up the list of equipment needed and organise its delivery later."
languages.original_text: "Я вас понял, Ваша Светлость. Так, нужно будет выписать им скоростные шаттлы, картографы... Простите, я займусь списком необходимого снаряжения и организацией его поставок позже".

traits.locale_text: "I understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, we'll need to issue high-speed shuttles, cartographers... Forgive me, I will draw up the list of equipment needed and organise its delivery later."
"I understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, we'll need to issue high-speed shuttles, cartographers... Forgive me, I will draw up the list of equipment needed and organise its delivery later."
"I understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, we'll need to issue high-speed shuttles, cartographers... Forgive me, I will draw up the list of equipment needed and organise its delivery later."

languages.text: 「承知いたしました、御{mf|殿|殿}。それでは、高速シャトルや測量士を派遣する必要があるでしょう。申し訳ありませんが、必要な装備のリストを作成し、その配達を後ほど手配いたします」
languages.original_text: "I understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, we'll need to issue high-speed shuttles, cartographers... Forgive me, I will draw up the list of equipment needed and organise its delivery later."

traits.locale_text: 「承知いたしました、御{mf|殿|殿}。それでは、高速シャトルや測量士を派遣する必要があるでしょう。申し訳ありませんが、必要な装備のリストを作成し、その配達を後ほど手配いたします。」

languages.text: «Entendido, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Necesitaremos lanzaderas de alta velocidad, cartógrafos... si me lo permite, organizaré la lista de equipamiento necesario y su traslado».
languages.original_text: "I understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, we'll need to issue high-speed shuttles, cartographers... Forgive me, I will draw up the list of equipment needed and organise its delivery later."

traits.locale_text: «Entendido, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Necesitaremos lanzaderas de alta velocidad, cartógrafos... si me lo permite, organizaré la lista de equipamiento necesario y su traslado».

languages.text: “明白，大人。那么我们需要调拨高速穿梭机、制图师……请原谅，我稍后就拟定装备清单并组织运输。”
languages.original_text: "I understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, we'll need to issue high-speed shuttles, cartographers... Forgive me, I will draw up the list of equipment needed and organise its delivery later."

traits.locale_text: “明白，大人。那么我们需要调拨高速穿梭机、制图师……请原谅，我稍后就拟定装备清单并组织运输。”

languages.text: "Ich verstehe, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Wir brauchen also Hochgeschwindigkeitsshuttles, Kartografen ... Verzeiht mir, ich werde die Liste der erforderlichen Ausrüstung später zusammenstellen und ihre Bereitstellung organisieren."
languages.original_text: "I understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, we'll need to issue high-speed shuttles, cartographers... Forgive me, I will draw up the list of equipment needed and organise its delivery later."

traits.locale_text: "Ich verstehe, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Wir brauchen also Hochgeschwindigkeitsshuttles, Kartografen ... Verzeiht mir, ich werde die Liste der erforderlichen Ausrüstung später zusammenstellen und ihre Bereitstellung organisieren."

languages.text: "Anlıyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Öyleyse yüksek hızlı mekikler, kartograflar tahsis etmemiz gerekecek... Bağışlayın, gerekli ekipman listesini çıkarıp teslimatını daha sonra organize edeceğim."
languages.original_text: "I understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, we'll need to issue high-speed shuttles, cartographers... Forgive me, I will draw up the list of equipment needed and organise its delivery later."

traits.locale_text: "Anlıyorum {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Öyleyse yüksek hızlı mekikler, kartograflar tahsis etmemiz gerekecek... Bağışlayın, gerekli ekipman listesini çıkarıp teslimatını daha sonra organize edeceğim."

languages.text: « Je comprends, Votre Seigneurie. Nous devrons dépêcher des navettes ultrarapides, des cartographes... Veuillez m'excuser. Je listerai l'équipement requis et organiserai sa livraison plus tard. »
languages.original_text: "I understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, we'll need to issue high-speed shuttles, cartographers... Forgive me, I will draw up the list of equipment needed and organise its delivery later."

traits.locale_text: « Je comprends, Votre Seigneurie. Nous devrons dépêcher des navettes ultrarapides, des cartographes... Veuillez m'excuser. Je listerai l'équipement requis et organiserai sa livraison plus tard. »
